infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Margi uses your location during an active journey to route emergencies and build the Golden Hour Packet.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Margi uses the camera to scan bystander relay QR codes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Margi records short emergency audio during Naari Shakti distress activation and may listen for distress sounds during an active journey.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Margi uses your photo library so you can choose a profile picture.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Margi uses your location during an active journey to route emergencies and build the Golden Hour Packet.

plugins.cameraPermission: Margi uses the camera to scan bystander relay QR codes.

plugins.microphonePermission: Margi listens for distress sounds during an active journey only — nothing is recorded or sent automatically.

plugins.photosPermission: Margi uses your photo library when you choose a profile picture.
